headline: AMD earnings, Fed commentary, April jobs report: What to Watch
summary: Asking for a Trend Host Josh Lipton previews several of the biggest stories to come throughout next week,  including earnings results out from companies like Advanced Micro Devices (AMD), Paramount Skydance (PSKY), Disney (DIS), Novo Nordisk (NVO), Pfizer (PFE), Warner Bros. Discovery (WBD), McDonald's (MCD), and Coinbase (COIN); a wave of fresh commentary from top Federal Reserve officials; and April's jobs reports due out next Friday. May 8.

headline: Trump expands worker access to retirement plans with new order
summary: President Trump signed an executive order to expand access to retirement plans for American workers who don't get 401(k)s on Thursday. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Jennifer Schonberger explains the significance of these Trump IRA accounts and what they mean for gig workers.

summary: UBS  analyst Stephen Ju   maintains Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $111 to $110.

headline: Lucid Robotaxi Deal With Uber And Hertz Adds New Growth Path
summary: Hertz, through its Oro Mobility affiliate, will operate Uber's Lucid-powered robotaxi fleet. The service is planned to launch in the San Francisco Bay Area by the end of 2026. This confirms a three way collaboration involving Uber, Hertz, and Lucid Group (NasdaqGS:LCID) around autonomous ride services. For Lucid Group, which is best known for premium electric vehicles and its technology platform, this move takes the business further into mobility services alongside traditional EV...

headline: Bill Ackman’s ‘Influencer Hedge Fund’ IPO Tanks 18% on Day 1
summary: Bill Ackman finally got his hedge fund public, and the market answered with a shrug. Pershing Square (NYSE:JCVC) priced its IPO at $50 and closed its first session at $41, an 18% drop on day one. The hosts of The Best One Yet labeled it the “first ever influencer hedge fund IPO,” a fitting frame ... Bill Ackman’s ‘Influencer Hedge Fund’ IPO Tanks 18% on Day 1

headline: UK's NHS and Matternet launch medical drone deliveries in London
summary: Drone delivery firm Matternet has begun transporting lab samples and pharmaceuticals for the UK’s National Health Service across London. Matternet founder and CEO Andreas Raptopoulos joins CNBC to discuss plans to expand its drone delivery network, scale the technology and transform healthcare logistics.

headline: Rivian Automotive Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Rivian Automotive (NASDAQ:RIVN) executives used the company’s first-quarter 2026 earnings call to highlight the start of “saleable” R2 production in Normal, Illinois, outline changes to the Georgia manufacturing plan, and provide updates on partnerships tied to autonomy development and funding. R2
